inputs.label: Good Parts Produced
inputs.businessContext: Number of defect-free parts produced during the planned production time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of defect-free parts produced during the planned production time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Planlanan üretim süresinde üretilen hatasız parça sayısı.

inputs.label: Total Parts Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total parts produced including defective ones.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total parts produced including defective ones.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hatalı olanlar dahil üretilen toplam parça sayısı.

inputs.label: Ideal Cycle Time
inputs.businessContext: The theoretical fastest time to produce one part.

businessContext_i18n.en: The theoretical fastest time to produce one part.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir parçayı üretmek için teorik en hızlı süre.

inputs.label: Planned Production Time
inputs.businessContext: Total scheduled production time for the shift or period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total scheduled production time for the shift or period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vardiya veya dönem için planlanan toplam üretim süresi.

inputs.label: Total Downtime
inputs.businessContext: Unplanned and planned stoppages during the planned production time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unplanned and planned stoppages during the planned production time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Planlanan üretim süresi içindeki plansız ve planlı duruşlar.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
